reviews.review_description: But How do I get rid of my fps stuck on my screen

Good weapons and physics 

Very gud

The physics were great. The weapon handling was much better than many other sandbox games I’ve experienced. My favorite part was testing out which weapons would destroy certain walls. The only gameplay issues I’ve had were with prop surfing on grab-ables (which is fun but takes from the realism), and lag spikes upon the removal of many broken walls (they only last until they get removed). Also, the ability to jump would be nice for extra combat moves.

reviews.review_title: Fun game with lots of options
reviews.review_description:
This is a fun app and the physics work good. I just needed some time to get used to the item spawning system, after that I had allot of fun trying al sorts of things out.
I like that there are a ton of weapons to choose from.
Really cool weapons and mechanics. Different kinds of swords and guns to use along with a variety of targets including barrels and AI bots. Movement can be customized!

reviews.review_title: Good for interacting with my son
reviews.review_description: It's a nice safe zone for taking out anger, I even can shoot my bow weirdly satisfying. The bigger and huge bots can get scary in a good way but just keep moving and hit the mid section lol

Congratulations to the game developers for starters. Listening, with many updates, it's a very good point especially regarding the evolution of the game!
But is it a game? 
It's a sand box to be exact.
We find ourselves in a sort of arena where we control everything. 
The choice of map, weapons, opponents and targets.
It's actually a large physics-based combat training field.
For my part, not being familiar with this type of game, I got a little lost at the beginning, taking the time to get used to the general ergonomics of the game. But once you start to understand how to generate the chosen weapon, the setting (explosive for me!) and the targets (robots, walls, etc.) the fun is coming!
And that's what this game is, it's a lot of fun.
Note that EVERYTHING is configurable!

A combat game that has great potentials. You fight AI robots in a sandbox using different types of weapons like guns, swords, and explosives.  It’s a fun way to exercise and get the heart pumping with hours of fun. Can’t wait to see what’s in store for the upcoming updates. Good job developers.
This is pretty cool once you get the hang of how to play.  I love the variety of weapons!
I got the game just for fun and was pleasantly surprised. Cool physics and very well animated destruction. Let's see what else the programmer brings to the game? I'll be surprised.

I have not played too much but what I have played is very enjoyable, fighting mechanics are very good.
Like the graphics and the devs is open to feedback .

Hope more updates come and more people enjoy this game.

It supports sitting mode, smooth turn, snap turn and other settings. And the turning speed is adjustable. There are multiple weapons to choose from, all with different effects. There are also robots available for testing. There are really many kinds of weapons.
you can use many items and gear to kill robots an it’s very fun 10 out of ten
The destruction is really good the ragdolls are good aswell loads of weapons to choose from and the game is pretty cheap
In this game you have the option to change map layouts and surroundings, use different types of weapons and shoot the a.i. robots. Fun game!

reviews.review_title: Lots of weapons to play with...
reviews.review_description: Lots of weapons to play with. Has good potential, can't wait for the next updates.
